name: Dipped Peanut Butter Sandwich Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup White or semi-sweet chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Taste of Home, 12/93
Spread peanut butter on half of the crackers; top with remaining crackers to make sandwiches. Refrigerate.
In a double boiler over simmering water, melt chocolate chips and shortening, stirring until smooth. Dip sandwiches and place on waxed paper until chocolate hardens.
Yield: 1 1/2 dozen
